description: Route selected verbs through permissive comedy handlers while preserving canonical action identities and delegation.

replacements.old:
<SYNTAX ATTACK OBJECT (FIND ACTORBIT) (ON-GROUND IN-ROOM)
	WITH OBJECT (FIND WEAPONBIT) (HELD CARRIED HAVE) = V-ATTACK>
replacements.new:
<SYNTAX ATTACK OBJECT (FIND ACTORBIT) (ON-GROUND IN-ROOM)
	WITH OBJECT (HELD CARRIED ON-GROUND IN-ROOM) = V-ABS-KILL>

replacements.old:
<SYNTAX KILL OBJECT (FIND ACTORBIT) (ON-GROUND IN-ROOM)
	WITH OBJECT (FIND WEAPONBIT) (HELD CARRIED HAVE) = V-ATTACK>
replacements.new:
<SYNTAX KILL OBJECT (FIND ACTORBIT) (ON-GROUND IN-ROOM)
	WITH OBJECT (HELD CARRIED ON-GROUND IN-ROOM) = V-ABS-KILL>

replacements.old: <SYNTAX PUT OBJECT (HELD MANY HAVE) IN OBJECT = V-PUT PRE-PUT>
replacements.new: <SYNTAX PUT OBJECT (HELD CARRIED ON-GROUND IN-ROOM MANY) IN OBJECT = V-ABS-PUT>
